siteTitle: Ozly - Unlimited Invoices & Taxes Under Control

hero.title: No more mess. Shifts, Invoices & Taxes in one place.
hero.titleHighlight: Built for ABN and/or TFN workers in Australia.
hero.subtitle: Schedule Jobs, issue and manage your invoices, forecast your revenue, track and organise tax-deductible expenses, estimate how much tax you'll owe this year, check your working hours compliance, and much more — all in one app! Starting from {price}.

audience.title: Built by immigrants, for immigrants and students working as freelancers in Australia

features.title: Everything ABN & TFN workers need,
features.subtitle: Stop juggling 4 different apps. Ozly handles shifts, invoices, tax, expenses, penalty rates and salary forecasting in one place.
features.shiftsDesc: Import Jobs from Google Calendar or create Jobs with flexible duration, frequency, and hourly rate. Issue invoices and send to contractors in seconds, track and chase overdue invoices.
features.ocrDesc: Snap a photo of receipts to claim tax-deductible expenses — the app stores and organises the photos, reads each item and estimates your deduction. Use Quick Mode to log with a single tap.
features.trackerDesc: See your gross pay, income tax withholding and net pay in real time. Automatic penalty rate calculations for weekends and public holidays, based on your industry.
features.forecastDesc: Compare your ABN income vs TFN salary to negotiate better terms with your employer. Know how much to set aside for your Tax Return and how much Superannuation you're entitled to.

comparison.title: Ozly
comparison.subtitle: Everything you need to work for yourself in Australia — no spreadsheets, no red tape, no headaches. Track your work, invoice your clients and know what's left in your pocket — all in one app.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no per-invoice fee, no percentage of your earnings. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.annualNote: * Annual plan: TFN/ABN $149.99/yr | MAX $199.99/yr. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.calendarNote: *** Currently integrates with Google Calendar. Compatible with apps that sync with Google Calendar.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: Ozly is a workforce-management and expense-tracking application designed for Australian contractors and small businesses. We collect only the data necessary to deliver our services. Your financial data is encrypted on your device, and you may request complete deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
privacy.s8: 8. Your Rights Under Australian Privacy Law

terms.title: Terms of Use (EULA)
terms.importantText: By downloading, installing, or using the Ozly application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the App.

faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Ozly. Can't find what you need? Get in touch.
faq.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.
faq.a1: Ozly is an app built for anyone working with an ABN and/or TFN in Australia — Cleaning, Aged & Childcare, Hospitality and any Sole Trader. Register your employers and shifts, generate unlimited invoices, log your expenses in seconds to claim on your tax return, and get a revenue forecast so you stay financially organised even on the go.
faq.a2: Yes! Ozly works 100% offline. You can create invoices, log expenses and track your jobs without wifi. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.
faq.q3: How does the smart camera for expenses work?
faq.a3: With Ozly's smart camera, just take a photo of your receipt and in seconds the app reads each item and all the data from the note, letting you select the ones that are work-related expenses, therefore deductible on your income tax (Tax return). The app stores the receipts and totals everything, estimating how much tax you'll owe at the end of the financial year.
faq.q4: Does the app calculate my tax?
faq.a4: Yes. Ozly estimates how much tax you'll owe following ATO (Australian Taxation Office) rules. No surprises at tax return time.
faq.q5: Does Ozly integrate with Google Calendar?
faq.a5: Yes, Ozly syncs with your Google Calendar, importing Jobs registered there. Handy when your employer schedules your shifts in Google Calendar. Just tap the calendar icon in the top corner of the main screen.
faq.q6: How does Ozly help with invoice management?
faq.a6: With Ozly, you not only generate your invoice in a professional standard template, but you can also send it via WhatsApp, email or even SMS to the contractor, all in seconds, without needing a bunch of spreadsheets!
faq.q7: Is Ozly available in other languages?
faq.a7: Yes! Ozly is available in Portuguese, English and Spanish, both in the app and on the website.
faq.a8: Visa Shield monitors your hours worked per fortnight (last 14 rolling days) to help you stay below the limit allowed for working and student visas.
faq.a9: The Hustle Score is a gamification system that rewards you with XP for completing jobs, creating invoices, logging expenses and maintaining streaks. You progress through 4 tiers: Starter, Hustler, Pro and Legend.
faq.a10: Yes. Your data is encrypted on your device and protected on the server. Ozly follows industry best practices to safeguard your personal and financial information.
faq.q11: How does the referral program work?
faq.a11: Share your referral code with friends. When they sign up using your code and after one month on a paid plan, you both get 15 free days. You also earn 500 XP for each converted referral.
faq.q12: What is the difference between TFN and ABN mode?
faq.a12: TFN mode is designed for employees (Tax File Number) — it shows net salary after PAYG withholding, super contributions, and doesn't require invoices. ABN mode is for contractors with an Australian Business Number — it includes invoicing, contractor management, and GST tracking. MAX plan gives you both.
faq.a13: Ozly automatically calculates penalty rates based on your industry (Cleaning, Hospitality, Retail, Construction, Transport, Healthcare, and more). Weekend and public holiday shifts get automatic multipliers on your base rate. It also knows all Australian public holidays by state.
faq.q14: Can I enter my salary as annual or fortnightly?
faq.a14: Yes! TFN users can enter their salary as Hourly, Annual, Monthly, or Fortnightly. Ozly automatically converts it to an hourly rate based on a standard 38-hour week and shows your estimated gross, PAYG and net take-home pay.
faq.a15: Quick Expense mode lets you log an expense with just the amount, category and date — no receipt photo needed. Smart mode uses AI OCR to read your receipt and extract all items automatically. You choose which mode suits each expense.
faq.q16: Can I bulk edit or delete multiple jobs?
faq.a16: Yes! Long-press any job to enter multi-select mode. You can then select multiple jobs and bulk edit the hourly rate or delete them all at once. Great for managing recurring shifts.
faq.a17: Ozly generates professional PDF timesheets from your completed jobs. You can filter by employer/contractor, and the timesheet includes dates, hours, rates, and totals. Share it directly via email or WhatsApp.
faq.a18: TFN and MAX users can log work-related expenses for reimbursement (fuel, laundry, tools, cleaning supplies, transport, uniform, phone, equipment). Use Smart Mode to scan a receipt with AI or Quick Mode to enter details manually. Select a period (weekly, fortnightly, monthly), choose a category, and save. You can then select multiple reimbursements, generate a professional PDF with your bank details, and send it to your employer via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q19: How do I export reimbursement PDFs?
faq.a19: Go to Reimbursements, tap the checklist icon to enter select mode, pick the items you want, and tap the PDF icon. Review your personal details, invoice number and bank info, then generate the PDF. You can send it via Email (with receipt photos attached), WhatsApp, or save it to your device. Items are automatically marked as 'emitted' after generating the PDF.
faq.q20: How does the referral program link work?
faq.a20: Each user gets a unique referral code. Share your personal link (ozly.au/refer/?code=YOUR_CODE) with friends. When they open it on their phone, the page automatically detects whether they're on iOS or Android and shows the right download button. They enter your code during signup, and you both earn rewards plus 500 XP.
faq.q21: Can I customise the email messages for invoices and reimbursements?
faq.a21: Yes! Go to Settings and find Message Templates. You can edit three templates: Invoice Send, Invoice Reminder, and Reimbursement. Each template supports placeholders like {name}, {number}, {amount} and {date} that are filled in automatically when you send. You can reset to defaults any time.
faq.q22: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a22: You can cancel anytime directly through the App Store or Google Play. No hassle, no cancellation fee. To cancel within the app, go to Menu → Settings → Account → Cancel subscription. If you also want to permanently delete your account and all data, tap Delete My Account.
